items.title: Anthropic Secures $5B from Amazon, Commits $100B in Cloud Spending
items.summary: Anthropic has received a $5 billion investment from Amazon, solidifying a strategic partnership that includes a commitment to spend $100 billion on Amazon's cloud services.

items.title: Google Expands Gemini AI Integration to Chrome in Seven New Countries
items.summary: Google is rolling out its Gemini AI capabilities within the Chrome browser to seven additional countries, broadening access to its generative AI features.

items.title: Qwen3.5-Omni Technical Report Released, Showcasing New Multimodal LLM
items.summary: A new technical report details Qwen3.5-Omni, a significant advancement in multimodal large language models, indicating progress in general-purpose AI capabilities.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI-Powered Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs has successfully raised $69 million in funding, aiming to expand its AI-driven platform for customer interviews following a high-profile viral hiring campaign.

items.title: OpenAI Partners with Hyatt to Advance AI Adoption Among Employees
items.summary: OpenAI is collaborating with Hyatt to integrate and advance AI tools, specifically ChatGPT Enterprise, within the hospitality company's internal operations and employee workflows.

items.title: Elucidating the SNR-t Bias of Diffusion Probabilistic Models
items.summary: New research explores and clarifies the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR-t) bias inherent in Diffusion Probabilistic Models, offering insights for improving their stability and performance.

items.title: PersonaVLM: Introducing Long-Term Personalized Multimodal LLMs
items.summary: Researchers present PersonaVLM, a novel approach to developing multimodal large language models capable of long-term personalization, enhancing user-specific interactions.

items.title: DeepER-Med: Advancing Evidence-Based Research in Medicine with Agentic AI
items.summary: DeepER-Med introduces an agentic AI framework designed to significantly advance deep evidence-based research in the medical field, promising more efficient and robust analysis.

items.title: Web Retrieval-Aware Chunking (W-RAC) for Efficient RAG Systems
items.summary: A new method, Web Retrieval-Aware Chunking (W-RAC), is proposed to create more efficient and cost-effective Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems by optimizing data chunking for web retrieval.

items.title: Stop Giving AI Agents AWS Credentials: A Better Way to Secure Access
items.summary: A new article advises against directly providing AI agents with AWS credentials, proposing more secure alternative methods for managing their access to cloud resources.

items.title: Zero Waste, Zero Stress: Building ReMake with AI-Assisted GitHub Copilot Development
items.summary: A developer shares insights on building the 'ReMake' project with enhanced efficiency and reduced stress, leveraging AI-assisted development through GitHub Copilot.

items.title: Motif-Video 2B: Technical Report on Advanced Video Generation Model
items.summary: The technical report for Motif-Video 2B has been released, detailing a new large-scale model designed for advanced video generation capabilities.

items.title: Bureaucratic Silences: What the Canadian AI Register Reveals, Omits, and Obscures
items.summary: An analysis of the Canadian AI Register highlights its limitations, revealing what the official record discloses, fails to mention, and intentionally obscures regarding AI systems.

items.title: QuantCode-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs in Algorithmic Trading
items.summary: QuantCode-Bench is introduced as a new benchmark specifically designed to assess the proficiency of Large Language Models in generating executable algorithmic trading strategies.

items.title: LARQL: Query Neural Network Weights Like a Graph Database
items.summary: LARQL is an innovative tool that allows users to query neural network weights as if they were a graph database, potentially simplifying analysis and manipulation of model architectures.
